captured_from: Hand-synthesized to exercise Technical Constraints' first-match-matching-SHA semantics (spec.md:85)
notes: Load-bearing adversarial fixture for the OK-first precedence algorithm. Line 3 carries a quoted exemplar `READ_OK:` line whose SHA (sha256sum of README.md) does NOT equal expected_sha. The reviewer's real sentinel appears later (preceded by intervening prose) and carries expected_sha. A naive first-match parser would misclassify this as `mismatch` against the decoy; the required first-match-matching-SHA semantics route to the real sentinel and return ('ok', expected_sha). DO NOT re-baseline this fixture without re-reading spec.md:85 and Edge Case 'Multiple READ_OK: lines in the window with different SHAs' (Requirement 6 test case (g)).
